title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a Google quantization technique that reduces KV cache and vector memory requirements in large language models. The method uses codebook-based vector quantization to compress activations while minimizing mean squared error and inner product error, enabling reduced VRAM usage on graphics cards.
